title: DeadPoly
description:
DeadPoly is a polygon arcade zombie survival looter shooter with base building, crafting, scavenging, leveling, questing, and more, but your only goal is survival, everything else is optional. 

• Play Your Way - Play single player, online server based multiplayer, or online co-op with friends

• Character Creation - Create a character just for you

• Base Building - Find materials to fortify a building and use it as your base, or create your own from scratch

• Crafting - Create hundreds of items for all types of situations

• Scavenging - Search the world or kill enemies to find items

• Gathering - Raw materials like wood, stone, metal, and more

• Gun Customization - Find and craft many different attachments to build a gun that suits your playstyle

• Survival Mechanics - Keep your hunger and thirst under control to stay alive

• Vehicles - Find, repair, and maintain drivable vehicles

• Farming - Plant crop plots to grow food and other resources

• Hunting - Hunt wildlife for food or sport

• Fishing - Simple fishing system to find unique items and food

• Vaulting - Dynamic vault / mantle system to climb basically anything

• Collect - There are hundreds of unique items to collect

• Day/Night Cycle - Prepare for the darkness beforehand or you'll regret it

• Weather Cycles - Enjoy many different weather cycles during your adventures

• Grid Inventory - In depth inventory management

The world is in the beginning stages of a zombie apocalypse. Lawlessness has broken out around the globe. Survive at all costs.
description_short: DeadPoly is a polygon arcade zombie survival looter shooter with base building, crafting, scavenging, leveling, questing, and more, but your only goal is survival, everything else is optional.
